pros: Best purchase according to Altroconsumo 2025 test

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 tests identify Tre Marie as the top pandoro and Conad as the best purchase; the evidence is fresh (published 2025‑12‑05).
